title: Xtra Crispy Argentinian Egg Frittata
description: A buttery and crispy egg dish from Argentina, perfect for a hangover cure, featuring egg whites and fried to perfection in a donabe vessel, suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the egg whites, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder until stiff peaks form.
In a donabe vessel, melt 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the diced red bell pepper and onion to the donabe and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Pour the whisked egg whites over the cooked vegetables in the donabe.
If using cheese, sprinkle it evenly over the top of the egg whites.
Transfer the donabe to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the top is golden brown.
Remove the donabe from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the donabe and slide it onto a plate.
Cut the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
